title: Omni's Breeding Timer
description: ⏱️ A lightweight client-side HUD timer for Cobblemon breeding (or any activity), with configurable length, in-game commands, keybinds to start/pause, and automatic alerts when the time is up.
body:
# ⏱️ Breeding Timer HUD  

A lightweight Fabric client-side mod that helps you keep track of Pokémon breeding times in Cobblemon (or anything you need a simple timer for).  

---

## ✨ Features
- ⏳ **Default timer length: 10 minutes** (configurable in-game).
- 🎮 **Start the timer** with a keybind (**default: H**) – fully configurable in Minecraft’s keybind menu.
- 👁️ **Toggle visibility & pause** the timer with a keybind (**default: O**).
- 💬 **In-game commands** to configure:
  - `/breedingtimer get` → Shows the current timer length.  
  - `/breedingtimer set <minutes>` → Sets the timer length.  
  - `/breedingtimer toggle` → Pauses/hides or resumes/shows the timer.  
  - `/breedingtimer sound on` → Enable timer sound alerts
  - `/breedingtimer sound off` → Disable timer sound alerts
  - `/breedingtimer sound toggle` → Switch sound alerts on/off
- 🖥️ Clean HUD overlay showing the countdown.  
- 🔔 Alerts you with a **Title + Chat message** when the timer finishes, then automatically restarts.  

---

## 🛠️ Usage
1. Press **H** to start the timer.  
2. Watch the countdown on your HUD.  
3. Get notified when time’s up!  
4. Use **O** or `/breedingtimer toggle` to pause/resume.  
5. Adjust the timer length anytime with `/breedingtimer set <minutes>`.  

---

## 📌 Notes
- Client-side only ✅  
- Perfect for Cobblemon breeding pastures 🐣, or any activity that needs a simple repeating timer.  

---

⚡ Simple. Handy. Essential for breeders!
